zh.lifeSummary: 當Marion Berwick於1410年出生時，她的父親Lord Thomas de Berwick Lord of Berwick25歲，母親Dama En Blanco21歲。她於1434年5月14日與James Livingston 1st Lord Livingston在蘇格蘭藍納可爾格拉斯哥結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1478年10月19日在英國蘇格蘭斯林史爾吉爾斯享年68歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Marion Berwick于1410年出生时，她的父亲Lord Thomas de Berwick Lord of Berwick25岁，母亲Dama En Blanco21岁。她于1434年5月14日与James Livingston 1st Lord Livingston在苏格兰藍納可爾格拉斯哥结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1478年10月19日在英国苏格兰斯林史爾吉爾斯享年68岁。

nameMeanings.name: Berwick
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish: habitational name primarily from Berwick-on-Tweed, on the Northumbrian coast at the mouth of the Tweed river, a border town that regularly changed hands between the Scots and the English. Also from any of the places called Berwick in Dorset and elsewhere, Berrick in Oxfordshire, Barwick in Norfolk and Yorkshire, or Barricks in High Easter, Essex. This could also be a topographic name for someone who lived ‘(at the) outlying grange’, from Middle English ber(e)wik ‘outlying grange or farm, demesne farm’ (Old English berewīc ‘barley farm’).

nameMeanings.name: Marion
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a medieval French diminutive form of Marie , introduced to Britain in the Middle Ages. In some places it was taken as a pet form of Margaret or Margery . As a male name, it is an altered form of the Continental male name Marian, a derivative of Latin Marianus (from Marius ), but is now rarely, if ever, used. It was the birth name of the American film star John Wayne ( 1907–79 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Marion Berwick was born in 1410, her father, Lord Thomas de Berwick Lord of Berwick, was 25 and her mother, Dama En Blanco, was 21. She married James Livingston 1st Lord Livingston on 14 May 1434, in Glasgow, Lanarkshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 19 October 1478, in Kilsyth, Stirlingshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 68.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Marion Berwick est née en 1410, son père, Lord Thomas de Berwick Lord of Berwick, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Dama En Blanco, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé James Livingston 1st Lord Livingston le 14 mai 1434, à Glasgow, Lanarkshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 19 octobre 1478, à Kilsyth, Stirlingshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 68 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Marion Berwick 1410 geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Lord Thomas de Berwick Lord of Berwick 25 und ihre Mutter Dama En Blanco 21. Sie hat am 14. Mai 1434 in Glasgow, Lanarkshire, Scotland James Livingston 1st Lord Livingston geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 19. Oktober 1478 im Alter von 68 Jahren in Kilsyth, Stirlingshire, Schottland, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Marion Berwick è nata il nel 1410, sua padre, Lord Thomas de Berwick Lord of Berwick, aveva 25 anni e sua madre, Dama En Blanco, aveva 21 anni. Lei sposato James Livingston 1st Lord Livingston il 14 maggio 1434, nel Glasgow, Lanarkshire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 19 ottobre 1478, nel Kilsyth, Stirlingshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 68 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Marion Berwickが1410年に生まれた時，父Lord Thomas de Berwick Lord of Berwickは25歳，母Dama En Blancoは21歳であった。1434年5月14日にスコットランドラナルクシュアイアグラスゴウでJames Livingston 1st Lord Livingstonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1478年10月19日にイギリススコットランドスティルリングシュアイアキルシスで68歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Marion Berwick(이)가 1410년에 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Lord Thomas de Berwick Lord of Berwick(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Dama En Blanco(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 1434년 5월 14일 스컷랜드 랜아르크실르 글라스고에서 James Livingston 1st Lord Livingston(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1478년 10월 19일 영국 스코틀랜드 스티를링실르 킬시스에서 68세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Marion Berwick nasceu em 1410, seu pai, Lord Thomas de Berwick Lord of Berwick, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Dama En Blanco, tinha 21 anos. Ela casou-se com James Livingston 1st Lord Livingston em 14 de maio de 1434, em Glasgow, Lanarkshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 19 de outubro de 1478, em Kilsyth, Stirlingshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 68 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Marion Berwick родилась в 1410 г., её отцу по имени Lord Thomas de Berwick Lord of Berwick было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Dama En Blanco, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени James Livingston 1st Lord Livingston 14 мая 1434 г. в местности гласгоу, ланаркшир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла 19 октября 1478 г. в местности килсит, стирлингшир, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 68 лет.

Se casó con James Livingston 1st Lord Livingston el 14 de mayo de 1434, en Glasgow, Lanarkshire, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 19 de octubre de 1478, en Kilsyth, Stirlingshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 68 años.
